name: io.github.ahmadzafar-code/emailsRboring
description: Safe, redacting Apple Mail MCP server (read/search + draft/organize/confirm-gated send). Fronts imdinu + sweetrb with OTP redaction, a fail-closed allowlist, and a confirm-only send gate.

environmentVariables.name: EMAILSRBORING_IMDINU_CMD
environmentVariables.description: Path to the imdinu apple-mail-mcp command (defaults to 'apple-mail-mcp' on PATH).

environmentVariables.name: EMAILSRBORING_SWEETRB_ENTRY
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to sweetrb's built entry (…/apple-mail-mcp/build/index.js).

_publishing_notes: To list in the official MCP registry: publish 'emailsrboring-mcp' to npm, then submit this file with the mcp-publisher CLI (namespace io.github.ahmadzafar-code is verified via the GitHub repo). Requires the two upstream servers (imdinu apple-mail-mcp via pipx + sweetrb apple-mail-mcp built) installed separately — see README.
